div.p: GroupByMap routes rows via group keys to specific GroupEntry slots. The finalize phase iterates across distinct groups, evaluating HAVING predicates before emission.

g.text: GroupEntry Byte Layout (64B Cache Line aligned)

ul.li: NULL is treated as a distinct value for GROUP BY hashing.
HAVING filters operate on finalized registers after AggAccumulator::finalize().

g.title: Virtual interface for all SQL aggregate functions
